calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, For Accounting By Trustee, To Restrain Trustee, For Forcible Entry, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Aimee Morris, via Zoom, for Portery McFadden, Petitioner; David Simon, via Zoom, for Cassandra McFadden, Objector.

Ms. Morris reports that the Richmond property has been sold and that the Texas property is in the process of being sold. The court offers its position and advises that this petition should be taken off calendar. Mr. Simon reports of continuing to work with Ms. Simon to comply with the terms of the settlement agreement and believes that this petition should be taken off calendar in accordance with terms included in the settlement agreement. The court reiterates its tentative ruling and advises the parties that should they require an order to enforce the settlement agreement they will need to file the proper papers to do so.

The Petition is taken off calendar.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, For Accounting By Trustee, To Restrain Trustee, For Forcible Entry, For Constructive Trust

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, For Accounting By Trustee, To Restrain Trustee, For Forcible Entry, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Continued To Dec-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, For Accounting By Trustee, To Restrain Trustee, For Forcible Entry, For Constructive Trust
Off Calendar May-10-2021 Continued To Sep-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Aimee Morris, via ZOOM, counsel for Portery McFadden, Petitioner, David Simon, via ZOOM, counsel for Cassandra McFadden, Objector.

At the onset, the court queries counsel as to the status of this matter. Ms. McFadden reports that she believes this matter is appropriate for mediation. Mr. Simon agrees and proposes that the court refer the matter to Pro Bono mediation. The court agrees and a Minute Order Referring Case to Pro Bono Mediation is signed in open court.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc., is continued to September 13, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Pursuant to the mediation order, the parties are to complete mediation by no later than August 16, 2021. Counsel must notify the assigned Probate Examiner of the status of mediation by August 30, 2021. A mediation Status Conference is set for September 13, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Counsel is advised to monitor the court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the Order Referring Case to Pro Bono Mediation.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, For Accounting By Trustee, To Restrain Trustee, For Forcible Entry, For Constructive Trust
